ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "classroom_name" TEXT /* Name of the classroom */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher assigned to the classroom */,
  "classroom_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the classroom can accommodate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the classroom was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the classroom was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classrooms_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher was hired */,
  "teacher_type" TEXT /* Type of teacher (full-time, part-time, etc.) */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Teacher's qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the grade */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom where the grade was given */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the grade was given */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment for which the grade was given */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (quiz, test, project, etc.) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* The grade itself */,
  "grade_comment" TEXT /* Comments made by the teacher for the grade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES teachers ("subject"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade history entry */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade being updated */,
  "previous_grade" INTEGER /* Previous grade before the update */,
  "new_grade" INTEGER /* New grade after the update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who updated the grade */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for updating the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_history_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)
